authority_boundary: This receipt records an AI-authored documentation revision. It is not a candidate artifact, SourceDescriptor, EvidenceBundle, PolicyDecision, ValidationReport, PromotionDecision, ReleaseManifest, CorrectionNotice, WithdrawalNotice, RollbackCard, steward approval, release approval, publication authority, or proof of runtime behavior.

rollback.strategy: Close the draft pull request before merge, or revert the generated-receipt commit and README commit in reverse order after merge.
